title: Scanner Auth Crawler + Builtin Scanner — Authenticated Scan Profiles
description: real_scanner.py performs real HTTP-based vulnerability detection (SQLi, XSS, SSRF, secrets) using pattern matching. builtin_scanner.py provides ScanFinding/ScanResult models with severity/phase enums. test_scanner_auth_crawl.py confirms auth crawling exists. Gap: authenticated scans use cookie-based auth only — OAuth2/API key auth profiles are not implemented, blocking scans of token-authenticated modern APIs.
missing: API key auth profile: add auth_type='api_key' scan profile that sets Authorization: Bearer {token} header on all scan requests
Scan rate limiting: implement configurable requests-per-second throttling in real_scanner to avoid triggering target WAF or rate limits
Scan credential vault: store scan auth credentials in secrets_management_engine instead of plaintext scan config
